_comment: FreightConnect — Next.js 15 + pnpm + Prisma, web surface only. Hooks: typecheck-on-edit + mark-verified (PostToolUse), smoke-check + tests + stop-verify (Stop), danger-block + pre-commit-gate (PreToolUse:Bash). NOTE: no permissions.allow rules are set here — run /fewer-permission-prompts (or add them yourself) to reduce approval prompts for pnpm/git/node/etc.

hooks.description: Type-check after file edits and surface errors back to Claude.
Record that a verification command ran (touches .claude/state/last-verified).
Smoke-check: dev server health + dev-server.log error scan + evidence reminder.
Run tests when Claude finishes a response — surface failures before handoff.
Soft-warn when source was edited but verification hasn't run since.

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|drop table|truncate|force.?push|>\s*/dev/sd' && { echo 'BLOCKED: dangerous command'; exit 2; } || exit 0

hooks.description: Hard-block git commit when staged source was edited after the last verification run.
